title: Manager – Business Development
metaDescription: Manager – Business Development role in Singapore: drive new business growth, build client relationships, and close engagements.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. We are looking for a Manager to join our Business Development team in Singapore.
duties: Drive new business growth and develop the client pipeline across target markets.
Build and maintain relationships with clients, partners, and intermediaries.
Identify opportunities, prepare proposals, and close engagements.
Represent the firm at networking events and industry forums.
Work with delivery teams to ensure client satisfaction and retention.
requirements: Degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field.
5+ years of business development or sales experience, ideally in professional services.
Proven track record of meeting revenue targets.
Excellent communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
